What Type of Allergy Do You Have?

તમારી એલર્જી કઈ છે? — ૩ સવાલ, ૩૦ સેકન્ડ

When do your symptoms appear most?
તમારા લક્ષણો ક્યારે વધુ આવે છે?
Which symptoms bother you most?
કયા લક્ષણ સૌથી વધુ પરેશાન કરે છે?
How long have you had this allergy?
ક્યારથી એલર્જી છે?
🌿

You have Chronic Allergic Rhinitis

Your symptoms suggest a deep-seated allergic constitution that can be permanently treated with Predictive Homeopathy. No steroids, no side effects.

Our Doctors

Meet Your Healers

Lead Physician
Dr. Bhargav Makwana
BHMS · SCPH (ICHM United Nations) · 12 Yrs Homeopathy Experience
12+ Years

Specialising in Allergy, Chronic & Complex diseases using Dr. Prafull Vijaykar's Predictive Homeopathy. Known across Rajkot for treating seemingly incurable cases — from allergic rhinitis and asthma to genetic autoimmune conditions. Runs "Hope for the Hopeless" community camps.

ડૉ. ભાર્ગવ — એલર્જી, ક્રોનિક અને જટિલ રોગો ના નિષ્ણાત. ઊંડી શ્રદ્ધા અને 12 વર્ષ અનુભવ.

🤧 Allergy Specialist 🫁 Asthma Predictive Homeopathy Chronic Diseases Genetic / Complex
Physician & Specialist
Dr. Masti Makwana
BHMS · SCPH (ICHM United Nations) · 12 Yrs Homeopathy Experience
12+ Years

A compassionate and precise homeopathic physician with 12 years of experience, specialising in female gynaecological health, paediatric care and Predictive Homeopathy. Dr. Masti's deep constitutional analysis ensures every patient receives targeted, lasting treatment.

ડૉ. મસ્તી — સ્ત્રી રોગો અને બાળ-સ્વાસ્થ્ય ના નિષ્ણાત. 12 વર્ષ અનુભવ.

Treatments

All Conditions We Treat

અમે જે બીમારીઓ ઠીક કરીએ છીએ

🤧
Allergy & Rhinitis
એલર્જી / નાકની એલર્જી

Allergic rhinitis, hay fever, dust allergy, pet allergy — constitutional cure

🫁
Asthma & Bronchitis
અસ્થમા / શ્વાસ

Allergic asthma, chronic bronchitis, shortness of breath — permanent relief

🧴
Skin Allergy
ચામડીની એલર્જી

Urticaria, eczema, contact dermatitis, angioedema — without steroids

🩺
Psoriasis & Vitiligo
સૉરાયસિસ / સફેદ ડાઘ

Deep miasmatic treatment for auto-immune skin conditions

🌸
Female Diseases
સ્ત્રી રોગો

PCOS, Fibroids, Infertility, Hormonal imbalance

👶
Children's Health
બાળ રોગો

Tonsillitis, bedwetting, autism, recurrent infections

🦴
Joint & Spine
સાંધા / કમર

Arthritis, Disc problems, Sciatica, Gout

🧠
Mental Health
માનસિક આરોગ્ય

Anxiety, Depression, OCD, Insomnia

🫘
Kidney Diseases
કિડની / પથરી

Kidney stones, CKD, Recurrent UTI

🧬
Genetic Diseases
વારસાગત રોગો

Auto-immune, hereditary — deepest miasmatic treatment

🫶
GI Disorders
પેટ-આંતરડાં

IBS, Piles, Fissure, Fistula — without operation

💆
Migraine
માઈગ્રેન

Chronic migraine & headache — permanent relief

Our Approach

Why Choose Vaidya?

શા માટે વૈદ્ય હોમિયોપેથી?

🎯
Predictive Homeopathy
ભવિષ્ય-નિર્ધારક ઉપચાર

Dr. Vijaykar's 7-Level Defence framework — treating the allergic constitution at its deepest root, not suppressing with antihistamines.

👩‍⚕️👨‍⚕️
Husband & Wife Doctors
ડૉ. ભાર્ગવ + ડૉ. મસ્તી

A rare duo with 12 years each — Dr. Bhargav for Allergy & Chronic, Dr. Masti for Female & Paediatric. Complete family care.

🚫💊
No Steroids Ever
સ્ટેરૉઇડ વિના ઉપચાર

Unlike conventional treatment, we never use steroids. 100% natural homeopathic medicines — safe for children, pregnant women and elderly.

🌱
Root Cause Treatment
મૂળ કારણ ઉપચાર

We treat the allergic diathesis — the underlying susceptibility — so your body stops reacting rather than just masking symptoms.

🙏
Faith & Compassion
શ્રદ્ધા અને કરુણા

"Hope for the Hopeless" — every patient treated with genuine care, renewed hope and deep faith in healing.

🌐
Online Consultation
ઓનલાઇન સલાહ

Patients across India and abroad can consult via WhatsApp or video call. Allergy treatment with no geographical limits.
